theme.name: BIOMORPHIC GRID ORCHESTRA
theme.style: A meticulous fusion of Swiss precision and fluid biomorphic aesthetics, creating dynamic, living layouts. Typography and imagery flow and adapt within a structured, yet evolving, framework, celebrating a harmonious interplay of rigid geometry and organic curves. Think structured chaos, digital flora, and intelligent negative space that breathes.
theme.mood: Precision, Organic Flow, Ethereal, Dynamic, Avant-Garde

layout.structure: Asymmetric with biomorphic overlays and dynamic grid shifts, embracing experimental overlap
layout.border_style: Ethereal gradient glows on organic shapes, 1px subtle dark border with 30% opacity on grid elements, rounded-3xl where elements meet biomorphic forms.

animation.style: Fluid micro-morphing elements, magnetic hover effects on biomorphic components, generative text reveals with organic growth patterns, parallax layers of structured grids and free-flowing forms.

components.subtitle: Where rigid precision meets the fluid ballet of biological forms, crafting interfaces that breathe and evolve.
